com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom

Interface IXOperation

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin

    public interface IXOperation
extends IXPlugin
    Operation Plugin class used for integration with Capital Harness MPM SBOM generation. This class represents the pluggable part of the operation which provides 3 separate pluggable components: the runtime component which is used by the SBOM generation engine, the parameters serializer which is used by the engine and the Pattern Builder, and the UI component which is used in the Capital Harness MPM application. The runtime component is exposed by this interface.

    Please refer to the SBOM programmer’s guide (CustomSBOMOperationDevelopment.pdf) for more information about SBOM generation and management.

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  IXOperation.IXOperationType
      The operation type is mainly used for presentation and management of operations.
      static class  IXOperation.StandardOperationTypeEnum
      Exposed standard operation types.

      Provides a hint as to how operations should be ordered when instantiated within the same pattern.

      Provides the component used to provide UI elements of the operation.

      The runtime part of the operation, invoked by the SBOM engine to generate a sub-assembly.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getType

        IXOperation.IXOperationType getType()
        Provides the type of this operation.
        Returns:
        The operation type

      • getOrderHint

        int getOrderHint()
        Provides a hint as to how operations should be ordered when instantiated within the same pattern. Also used to sort the operations within their types for presentation purpose.
        Returns:
        A number which represents the order of this operation type

      • getParametersSerializer

        IXOperationParametersSerializer getParametersSerializer()
        Provides the component used to serialize paremeters.
        Returns:
        The serializer component of the operation, or null if it has no parameters

      • getUI

        IXOperationUI getUI()
        Provides the component used to provide UI elements of the operation.
        Returns:
        The UI component of the operation, or null if it has no UI elements

      • runSelector

        boolean runSelector(IXSubAssembly subAssembly,
                    IXSBOMContext context,
                    java.util.Set<IXSubAssembly> combinedObjects)
        The runtime part of the operation, invoked by the SBOM engine to generate a sub-assembly. The input is an already existing sub-assembly. The operation must return a non null - but possibly empty - collection if it requires this input object to build its output. The returned collection contains any additional sub-assemblies which will be combined with the main input sub-assembly to build the output parent sub-assembly.
        Parameters:
        subAssembly - The main input sub-assembly.
        context - This object provides information contextual to the SBOM being generated
        combinedObjects - The set of objects to be combined with the input object to form the next level of sub-assembly as output to this operation
        Returns:
        true if this operation is actually selecting the input object and producing a result from it, false otherwise

      • reset

        void reset()
        This method is invoked by the engine before and after each generation run, on all active operations in the pattern which is used. The implementation should reset any internal state it may have used during the previous run, such as clearing any instance variables etc...
